updates.prompt: You misunderstood me. I said, if it was an analogy, that the conversation and building the game was a maze that you would be using the quantum computer to be knowing all the possibilities at once.
updates.action_taken: Corrected ontological misunderstanding. Refactored J-Space and Quantum Engine to include Quantum Maze Navigation—the ability to superpose all conversational and development paths at once to find the absolute truth or optimal exit.
